A
Admin RobboMaster
admin@robbomaster.ro
Administrator
/* Status colors */ --success: #10B981; --success-soft: #D1FAE5; --success-bg: #ECFDF5; --warning: #F59E0B; --warning-soft: #FEF3C7; --warning-bg: #FFFBEB; --danger: #EF4444; --danger-soft: #FEE2E2; --danger-bg: #FEF2F2; --info: #3B82F6; --info-soft: #DBEAFE; --info-bg: #EFF6FF; --purple: #8B5CF6; --purple-soft: #EDE9FE; /* Shadows */ --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); --shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.06), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.03); --shadow-md: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.06), 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); --shadow-lg: 0 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); --shadow-yellow: 0 4px 14px rgba(255, 204, 31, 0.35); /* Layout */ --radius-sm: 6px; --radius: 8px; --radius-md: 10px; --radius-lg: 14px; --radius-xl: 20px; --sidebar-w: 248px; --font: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; } * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; } html, body { background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); font-family: var(--font); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; min-height: 100vh; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } button { font-family: inherit; cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none; color: inherit; font-size: inherit; } input, select, textarea { font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; color: inherit; } ::selection { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--text); } /* ============ SCROLLBARS ============ */ ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; height: 8px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border-strong); border-radius: 4px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: var(--text-muted); } /* ============ APP LAYOUT ============ */ .app { display: grid; grid-template-columns: var(--sidebar-w) 1fr; min-height: 100vh; } /* ============ SIDEBAR ============ */ .sidebar-backdrop { display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); z-index: 35; } .sidebar { background: var(--bg-soft); border-right: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 20px 14px; position: sticky; top: 0; height: 100vh; overflow-y: auto; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 10px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom: 16px; } .brand-logo-img { width: 100%; max-width: 220px; display: flex; align-items: center; } .brand-logo-img img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; object-fit: contain; } .brand-logo { width: 38px; height: 38px; background: var(--yellow); border-radius: 9px; display: grid; place-items: center; flex-shrink: 0; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .brand-logo svg { width: 26px; height: 26px; } .brand-text { font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.1; } .brand-text small { display: block; color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 500; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0; margin-top: 2px; } .nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1px; } .nav-section { font-size: 10.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; margin: 16px 10px 6px; } .nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 10px; border-radius: var(--radius); color: var(--text-soft); font-weight: 500; transition: all 0.12s; width: 100%; text-align: left; font-size: 13.5px; position: relative; } .nav-item:hover { background: var(--bg-hover); color: var(--text); } .nav-item.active { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--text); font-weight: 600; } .nav-item.active .nav-icon { color: var(--text); } .nav-item .nav-icon { width: 18px; height: 18px; display: grid; place-items: center; color: var(--text-dim); flex-shrink: 0; } .nav-item:hover .nav-icon { color: var(--text); } .nav-item .badge { margin-left: auto; background: var(--danger); color: white; font-size: 10.5px; padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 10px; font-weight: 700; min-width: 18px; text-align: center; } .nav-item.active .badge { background: var(--text); color: var(--yellow); } .sidebar-bottom { margin-top: auto; padding-top: 16px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); } .role-switcher { padding: 12px; background: var(--bg-card); border-radius: var(--radius); border: 1px solid var(--border); } .role-switcher label { font-size: 10.5px; color: var(--text-muted); display: block; margin-bottom: 6px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; } .role-switcher select { width: 100%; background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); padding: 7px 10px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.12s; } .role-switcher select:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--yellow); } .user-card { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px; margin-top: 10px; border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); } .user-avatar { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--yellow), var(--yellow-deep)); color: var(--text); font-weight: 700; display: grid; place-items: center; font-size: 12px; flex-shrink: 0; } .user-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.2; } .user-email { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 1px; } .user-role-pill { display: inline-block; margin-top: 4px; padding: 2px 7px; background: var(--yellow-pale); color: var(--text); border-radius: 999px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.02em; border: 1px solid var(--yellow-soft); } .btn-logout { width: 100%; margin-top: 8px; justify-content: center; background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-soft); font-size: 12.5px; } .btn-logout:hover { background: var(--danger-bg); border-color: var(--danger-soft); color: var(--danger); } .btn-logout svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; } /* ============ LOGIN ============ */ .login-screen { min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--bg) 0%, var(--yellow-pale) 100%); padding: 20px; } .login-card { width: 100%; max-width: 420px; background: var(--bg-card); border-radius: 20px; padding: 40px 32px; box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(24, 24, 27, 0.08), 0 4px 20px rgba(24, 24, 27, 0.04); border: 1px solid var(--border); } .login-logo { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 28px; } .login-logo svg { width: 100%; max-width: 240px; height: auto; } .login-title { text-align: center; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 6px; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .login-sub { text-align: center; font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--text-soft); margin-bottom: 28px; } .login-form { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; } .login-form label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-soft); margin-bottom: 6px; display: block; } .login-form input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 14px; background: var(--bg-soft); border: 1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; font-size: 14px; transition: all 0.15s; font-family: inherit; } .login-form input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--yellow); background: var(--bg-card); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px var(--yellow-pale); } .login-btn { width: 100%; padding: 13px; background: var(--yellow); color: var(--text); font-weight: 700; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; border: none; margin-top: 8px; transition: all 0.15s; } .login-btn:hover { background: var(--yellow-bright); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(255, 204, 31, 0.4); } .login-error { background: var(--danger-bg); border: 1px solid var(--danger-soft); color: var(--danger); padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; text-align: center; } /* ============ MAIN ============ */ .main { padding: 24px 32px; max-width: 1400px; width: 100%; } /* ============ PAGE HEADER ============ */ .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 20px; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .page-title-wrap { min-width: 0; } .page-title { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.025em; line-height: 1.1; } .page-sub { color: var(--text-soft); margin-top: 5px; font-size: 13.5px; } .page-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; } /* ============ BREADCRUMBS ============ */ .breadcrumbs { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 6px; font-size: 12.5px; color: var(--text-dim); } .breadcrumbs a { color: var(--text-dim); transition: color 0.12s; cursor: pointer; } .breadcrumbs a:hover { color: var(--text); } .breadcrumbs .sep { color: var(--text-muted); } /* ============ BUTTONS ============ */ .btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); font-weight: 500; font-size: 13px; transition: all 0.12s; white-space: nowrap; } .btn:hover { background: var(--bg-hover); border-color: var(--border-strong); } .btn-primary { background: var(--yellow); border-color: var(--yellow); color: var(--text); font-weight: 600; } .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--yellow-deep); border-color: var(--yellow-deep); box-shadow: var(--shadow-yellow); } .btn-dark { background: var(--text); border-color: var(--text); color: white; font-weight: 600; } .btn-dark:hover { background: #27272A; border-color: #27272A; } .btn-danger { background: var(--danger-bg); border-color: var(--danger-soft); color: var(--danger); } .btn-danger:hover { background: var(--danger); border-color: var(--danger); color: white; } .btn-ghost { background: transparent; border-color: transparent; } .btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--bg-hover); } .btn-sm { padding: 5px 10px; font-size: 12px; } .btn-lg { padding: 11px 18px; font-size: 14px; } .btn-icon { padding: 7px; } .btn .icon { width: 14px; height: 14px; flex-shrink: 0; } /* ============ CARDS ============ */ .card { background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 20px; transition: border-color 0.12s; } .card-hoverable:hover { border-color: var(--border-strong); } .card-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 16px; gap: 12px; } .card-title { font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .card-sub { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 2px; } .card-padded { padding: 24px; } .card-flat { padding: 0; overflow: hidden; } /* ============ STATS ============ */ .stat-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .stat { background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 16px 18px; transition: all 0.12s; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .stat:hover { border-color: var(--border-strong); } .stat-label { font-size: 11.5px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 8px; } .stat-value { font-size: 26px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.1; } .stat-trend { font-size: 11.5px; margin-top: 6px; color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 500; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .stat-trend.up { color: var(--success); } .stat-trend.down { color: var(--danger); } .stat-icon { position: absolute; top: 14px; right: 14px; width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); background: var(--yellow-pale); display: grid; place-items: center; color: var(--yellow-deep); opacity: 0.7; } .stat.danger .stat-icon { background: var(--danger-soft); color: var(--danger); } .stat.success .stat-icon { background: var(--success-soft); color: var(--success); } .stat.info .stat-icon { background: var(--info-soft); color: var(--info); } /* ============ BADGES ============ */ .badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; white-space: nowrap; } .badge-success { background: var(--success-soft); color: #047857; } .badge-warning { background: var(--warning-soft); color: #B45309; } .badge-danger { background: var(--danger-soft); color: #B91C1C; } .badge-info { background: var(--info-soft); color: #1E40AF; } .badge-purple { background: var(--purple-soft); color: #6D28D9; } .badge-yellow { background: var(--yellow-soft); color: #92750E; } .badge-neutral { background: var(--bg-soft); color: var(--text-soft); border: 1px solid var(--border); } .badge-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-block; } /* ============ TABLES ============ */ table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; } th { text-align: left; padding: 11px 16px; font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 700; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg-soft); white-space: nowrap; } th:first-child { padding-left: 20px; } th:last-child { padding-right: 20px; } td { padding: 13px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); font-size: 13.5px; vertical-align: middle; } td:first-child { padding-left: 20px; } td:last-child { padding-right: 20px; } tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; } tbody tr { transition: background 0.1s; } tbody tr:hover { background: var(--bg-hover); cursor: pointer; } /* ============ FORMS ============ */ .form-group { margin-bottom: 14px; } .form-group label { display: block; font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 5px; color: var(--text-soft); } .form-group .label-required::after { content: ' *'; color: var(--danger); } .form-group input, .form-group select, .form-group textarea { width: 100%; padding: 9px 12px; background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); color: var(--text); transition: border 0.12s, box-shadow 0.12s; font-size: 13.5px; } .form-group input:focus, .form-group select:focus, .form-group textarea:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--yellow); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--yellow-pale); } .form-group textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 80px; line-height: 1.5; } .form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; } .form-row-3 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; } .form-help { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 4px; } /* ============ MODAL ============ */ .modal-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(24, 24, 27, 0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); z-index: 100; display: none; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 20px; animation: fadeIn 0.15s; } .modal-overlay.active { display: flex; } @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } } .modal { background: var(--bg-card); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); width: 100%; max-width: 540px; max-height: 90vh; overflow-y: auto; box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); animation: slideUp 0.2s ease-out; } @keyframes slideUp { from { transform: translateY(20px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } } .modal-lg { max-width: 760px; } .modal-xl { max-width: 980px; } .modal-header { padding: 20px 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .modal-title { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.015em; } .modal-body { padding: 24px; } .modal-footer { padding: 16px 24px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px; background: var(--bg-soft); } /* ============ EMPTY STATE ============ */ .empty-state { text-align: center; padding: 50px 20px; color: var(--text-dim); } .empty-state-icon { width: 56px; height: 56px; margin: 0 auto 14px; background: var(--bg-soft); border-radius: 50%; display: grid; place-items: center; color: var(--text-muted); } .empty-state h3 { font-size: 15px; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 4px; font-weight: 600; } .empty-state p { font-size: 13px; max-width: 320px; margin: 0 auto; } /* ============ TOAST ============ */ .toast-container { position: fixed; bottom: 24px; right: 24px; z-index: 1000; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .toast { background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 12px 16px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); min-width: 280px; animation: slideInRight 0.25s ease-out; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; } .toast.success { border-left: 3px solid var(--success); } .toast.error { border-left: 3px solid var(--danger); } .toast.info { border-left: 3px solid var(--info); } .toast.warning { border-left: 3px solid var(--warning); } @keyframes slideInRight { from { transform: translateX(100%); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } } /* ============ AVATARS ============ */ .avatar { border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--yellow), var(--yellow-deep)); color: var(--text); font-weight: 700; display: grid; place-items: center; flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 12px; } .avatar.av-blue { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #60A5FA, #2563EB); color: white; } .avatar.av-green { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #34D399, #059669); color: white; } .avatar.av-purple { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #A78BFA, #7C3AED); color: white; } .avatar.av-pink { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F472B6, #DB2777); color: white; } .avatar.av-orange { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FB923C, #EA580C); color: white; } .avatar.av-md { width: 36px; height: 36px; font-size: 13px; } .avatar.av-lg { width: 56px; height: 56px; font-size: 18px; } .avatar.av-xl { width: 72px; height: 72px; font-size: 24px; } /* ============ FILTER BAR ============ */ .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; } .filter-bar input, .filter-bar select { padding: 8px 12px; background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); color: var(--text); font-size: 13px; transition: border-color 0.12s; } .filter-bar input { flex: 1; min-width: 240px; max-width: 360px; } .filter-bar select { min-width: 160px; cursor: pointer; } .filter-bar input:focus, .filter-bar select:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--yellow); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--yellow-pale); } .search-input-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1; min-width: 240px; max-width: 360px; } .search-input-wrap input { width: 100%; padding-left: 36px; } .search-input-wrap .icon { position: absolute; left: 11px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: var(--text-muted); pointer-events: none; } /* ============ ICONS (inline SVG via mask) ============ */ .ico { display: inline-block; width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; stroke: currentColor; fill: none; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; } .ico-lg { width: 20px; height: 20px; } .ico-xl { width: 24px; height: 24px; } /* ============ TABS ============ */ .tabs { display: flex; gap: 2px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom: 20px; overflow-x: auto; scrollbar-width: none; } .tabs::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; } .tab { padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-soft); border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; margin-bottom: -1px; transition: all 0.12s; white-space: nowrap; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .tab:hover { color: var(--text); } .tab.active { color: var(--text); border-bottom-color: var(--yellow-deep); font-weight: 600; } .tab .tab-count { background: var(--bg-soft); color: var(--text-dim); padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; } .tab.active .tab-count { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--text); } /* ============ ALERT BANNERS ============ */ .alert-banner { border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 14px 16px; margin-bottom: 12px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; border: 1px solid; } .alert-banner.danger { background: var(--danger-bg); border-color: var(--danger-soft); } .alert-banner.warning { background: var(--warning-bg); border-color: var(--warning-soft); } .alert-banner.info { background: var(--info-bg); border-color: var(--info-soft); } .alert-banner.success { background: var(--success-bg); border-color: var(--success-soft); } .alert-banner-icon { width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; display: grid; place-items: center; flex-shrink: 0; color: white; font-weight: 700; } .alert-banner.danger .alert-banner-icon { background: var(--danger); } .alert-banner.warning .alert-banner-icon { background: var(--warning); } .alert-banner.info .alert-banner-icon { background: var(--info); } .alert-banner.success .alert-banner-icon { background: var(--success); } .alert-banner-content { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .alert-banner-title { font-weight: 600; font-size: 13.5px; } .alert-banner-desc { font-size: 12.5px; color: var(--text-soft); margin-top: 2px; } .alert-banner-actions { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-shrink: 0; flex-wrap: wrap; } .btn-resolve { background: var(--success-bg); border: 1px solid var(--success-soft); color: var(--success); font-weight: 600; } .btn-resolve:hover { background: var(--success); color: white; border-color: var(--success); } .btn-danger-soft { background: var(--danger-bg); border: 1px solid var(--danger-soft); color: var(--danger); font-weight: 600; } .btn-danger-soft:hover { background: var(--danger); color: white; border-color: var(--danger); } /* ============ DASHBOARD GRID ============ */ .dashboard-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .dashboard-grid-3 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 20px; } @media (max-width: 1100px) { .dashboard-grid, .dashboard-grid-3 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } } /* ============ CHART CONTAINER ============ */ .chart-container { position: relative; height: 280px; margin-top: 8px; } .chart-controls { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); } .chart-pill { padding: 5px 11px; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg-card); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-soft); transition: all 0.12s; } .chart-pill:hover { border-color: var(--border-strong); } .chart-pill.active { background: var(--text); color: white; border-color: var(--text); } /* ============ CHART FILTERS ============ */ .chart-filter-row { display: flex; gap: 14px; align-items: flex-end; flex-wrap: wrap; padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom: 12px; } .chart-filter-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; min-width: 180px; flex: 1; } .chart-filter-group label { font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-dim); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; } .chart-filter-group select, .chart-filter-group input { padding: 7px 10px; background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); font-size: 13px; font-family: inherit; color: var(--text); cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.12s; } .chart-filter-group select:focus, .chart-filter-group input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--yellow); } .chart-custom-range { display: flex; gap: 14px; align-items: flex-end; flex-wrap: wrap; padding: 12px 14px; background: var(--yellow-pale); border: 1px solid var(--yellow-soft); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); margin-bottom: 12px; } /* ============ KPI SUMMARY ============ */ .kpi-summary-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; margin-top: 18px; padding-top: 18px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); } .kpi-tile { background: var(--bg-soft); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 14px 16px; transition: all 0.15s; } .kpi-tile:hover { background: var(--bg-card); border-color: var(--border-strong); transform: translateY(-1px); } .kpi-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-dim); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-bottom: 6px; } .kpi-value { font-size: 26px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text); letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 6px; } .kpi-value.good { color: var(--success); } .kpi-value.warn { color: var(--warning); } .kpi-value.bad { color: var(--danger); } .kpi-bar { height: 6px; background: var(--border); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 6px; } .kpi-bar-fill { height: 100%; background: var(--yellow); border-radius: 3px; transition: width 0.4s; } .kpi-bar-fill.good { background: var(--success); } .kpi-bar-fill.warn { background: var(--warning); } .kpi-bar-fill.bad { background: var(--danger); } .kpi-meta { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-soft); } /* ============ TASK LIST ============ */ .task-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; } .task-card { display: flex; gap: 14px; padding: 14px 16px; background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); transition: all 0.15s; } .task-card:hover { border-color: var(--border-strong); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(24, 24, 27, 0.04); } .task-card.completed { opacity: 0.65; background: var(--bg-soft); } .task-card.completed .task-card-title { text-decoration: line-through; color: var(--text-dim); } .task-card.overdue { border-left: 3px solid var(--danger); } .task-card-checkbox { width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 6px; border: 2px solid var(--border-strong); display: grid; place-items: center; cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px; background: var(--bg-card); color: white; font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; transition: all 0.15s; } .task-card-checkbox:hover { border-color: var(--success); background: var(--success-bg); } .task-card.completed .task-card-checkbox { background: var(--success); border-color: var(--success); } .task-card-body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .task-card-title { font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 4px; display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; } .task-card-desc { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-soft); margin-bottom: 8px; line-height: 1.45; } .task-card-meta { display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-soft); align-items: center; } .task-card-meta svg { width: 13px; height: 13px; vertical-align: middle; } .task-card-actions { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-direction: column; flex-shrink: 0; align-items: flex-end; } @media (max-width: 700px) { .task-card { flex-wrap: wrap; } .task-card-actions { flex-direction: row; width: 100%; margin-top: 6px; justify-content: flex-end; } } .task-priority { font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .task-priority-high { background: var(--danger-bg); color: var(--danger); border: 1px solid var(--danger-soft); } .task-priority-medium { background: var(--warning-bg); color: var(--warning); border: 1px solid var(--warning-soft); } .task-priority-low { background: var(--info-bg); color: var(--info); border: 1px solid var(--info-soft); } /* ============ CLUB CARD ============ */ .club-card { background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 18px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .club-card:hover { border-color: var(--yellow-deep); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); } .club-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px; background: var(--yellow); } .club-card-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: -0.015em; margin-bottom: 4px; } .club-card-address { color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 12.5px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .club-card-stats { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 8px; padding-top: 12px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); } .club-stat-item { text-align: center; } .club-stat-num { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); letter-spacing: -0.015em; } .club-stat-label { font-size: 10.5px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 600; margin-top: 2px; } /* ============ GROUP CARD ============ */ .group-card { background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 14px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.12s; position: relative; } .group-card:hover { border-color: var(--yellow-deep); transform: translateY(-1px); } .group-card-time { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-weight: 600; font-size: 12px; color: var(--yellow-deep); letter-spacing: 0; background: var(--yellow-pale); display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; } .group-card-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 14.5px; margin: 8px 0 4px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .group-card-meta { color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; margin-bottom: 4px; } .group-card-stats { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 10px; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--text-soft); font-weight: 500; } .group-card-stats span { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } /* ============ ATTENDANCE ============ */ .attendance-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .student-row { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 12px 14px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--bg-card); gap: 12px; transition: all 0.12s; } .student-row:hover { border-color: var(--border-strong); background: var(--bg-hover); } .student-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; cursor: pointer; } .student-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 13.5px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .student-meta { color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 12px; margin-top: 1px; } .student-balance { font-size: 11.5px; font-family: var(--font-mono); padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 600; } .student-balance.ok { background: var(--success-soft); color: #047857; } .student-balance.warn { background: var(--warning-soft); color: #B45309; } .student-balance.bad { background: var(--danger-soft); color: #B91C1C; } .attendance-toggle { display: flex; gap: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; } .att-btn { padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); border: 1px solid var(--border); font-weight: 600; font-size: 11.5px; transition: all 0.12s; background: var(--bg-card); color: var(--text-soft); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; } .att-btn:hover { border-color: var(--border-strong); } .att-btn.present-active { background: var(--success); color: white; border-color: var(--success); } .att-btn.absent-active { background: var(--danger); color: white; border-color: var(--danger); } .att-btn.makeup-active { background: var(--info); color: white; border-color: var(--info); } .makeup-slot { background: var(--info-bg); border: 1px dashed var(--info); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 14px 16px; margin-top: 16px; } .makeup-slot-title { font-size: 13px; color: #1E40AF; font-weight: 700; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 4px; } .makeup-slot-desc { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-soft); margin-bottom: 12px; } .makeup-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: white; border: 1px solid var(--info-soft); color: #1E40AF; padding: 4px 10px 4px 4px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; margin-right: 6px; margin-bottom: 6px; } .makeup-pill .makeup-pill-avatar { width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--info); color: white; font-size: 10px; display: grid; place-items: center; } /* ============ PROFILE ============ */ .profile-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding-bottom: 18px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom: 18px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .profile-info-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr)); gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 18px; } .profile-field { background: var(--bg-soft); padding: 11px 13px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); } .profile-field-label { font-size: 10.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-bottom: 3px; } .profile-field-value { font-weight: 600; font-size: 13.5px; } .quick-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .quick-action-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg-card); color: var(--text); font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 500; transition: all 0.12s; } .quick-action-btn:hover { background: var(--bg-hover); border-color: var(--border-strong); } .quick-action-btn.whatsapp { color: #128C7E; border-color: #128C7E33; background: #128C7E10; } .quick-action-btn.whatsapp:hover { background: #128C7E20; } .quick-action-btn.call { color: var(--info); border-color: var(--info-soft); background: var(--info-bg); } .quick-action-btn.call:hover { background: var(--info-soft); } .quick-action-btn.sms { color: #92750E; border-color: var(--yellow-soft); background: var(--yellow-pale); } .quick-action-btn.sms:hover { background: var(--yellow-soft); } /* ============ ATTENDANCE HISTORY DOTS ============ */ .att-history { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 3px; margin-top: 8px; } .att-dot { width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 5px; display: grid; place-items: center; font-size: 11px; color: white; font-weight: 700; cursor: help; } .att-dot.present { background: var(--success); } .att-dot.absent { background: var(--danger); } .att-dot.absent-motiv { background: var(--warning); color: var(--text); } .att-dot.makeup { background: var(--info); } .att-dot.holiday { background: var(--bg-soft); color: var(--text-muted); border: 1px solid var(--border); } /* ============ MENTIONS ============ */ .mention-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; } .mention-item { background: var(--bg-soft); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 12px 14px; } .mention-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; } .mention-author { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 12.5px; } .mention-author-name { font-weight: 600; } .mention-author-role { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-dim); background: var(--bg-card); padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 4px; } .mention-time { font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--text-dim); } .mention-content { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.5; } .mention-type { font-size: 10.5px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 6px; color: var(--text-dim); } /* ============ LEAD CARDS ============ */ .lead-card { background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.12s; } .lead-card:hover { border-color: var(--border-strong); } .lead-card.dragging { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(0.95); } .kanban-col-drop { background: rgba(255, 204, 31, 0.12) !important; outline: 2px dashed var(--primary); outline-offset: -4px; } .lead-card-source { font-size: 10.5px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-dim); margin-bottom: 6px; } .lead-card-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 2px; } .lead-card-meta { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-soft); margin-bottom: 8px; } .lead-card-time { font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--text-dim); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } /* ============ KANBAN ============ */ .kanban { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; overflow-x: auto; } .kanban-col { background: var(--bg-soft); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 12px; min-height: 200px; } .kanban-col-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 10px; padding: 0 4px; } .kanban-col-title { font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--text-soft); } .kanban-col-count { background: var(--bg-card); color: var(--text-soft); padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 700; } .kanban-cards { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } /* ============ TIMELINE ============ */ .timeline { position: relative; padding-left: 24px; } .timeline::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 7px; top: 6px; bottom: 6px; width: 2px; background: var(--border); } .timeline-item { position: relative; padding-bottom: 16px; } .timeline-item::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -22px; top: 4px; width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--yellow); border: 2px solid var(--bg-card); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--yellow); } .timeline-item.success::before { background: var(--success); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--success); } /* ============ LESSON REPORTS HISTORY ============ */ .lesson-reports-history { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; } .lesson-report-item { background: var(--bg-soft); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 14px 16px; transition: all 0.15s; } .lesson-report-item:hover { background: var(--yellow-pale); border-color: var(--yellow-soft); } .lesson-report-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .lesson-report-date { font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .lesson-report-date svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; } .lesson-report-author { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--text-soft); font-weight: 500; } .lesson-report-content { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--text); white-space: pre-wrap; margin-bottom: 6px; } .lesson-report-meta { font-size: 10.5px; color: var(--text-dim); font-style: italic; } .timeline-item.danger::before { background: var(--danger); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--danger); } .timeline-item.info::before { background: var(--info); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--info); } .timeline-time { font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--text-dim); margin-bottom: 2px; } .timeline-title { font-weight: 600; font-size: 13.5px; } .timeline-desc { font-size: 12.5px; color: var(--text-soft); margin-top: 2px; } /* ============ MOBILE TOPBAR ============ */ .mobile-topbar { display: none; background: var(--bg-soft); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 12px 16px; align-items: center; gap: 12px; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 30; } .mobile-topbar .brand-text { font-size: 13px; } .mobile-toggle { background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 7px; color: var(--text); } /* ============ RESPONSIVE ============ */ @media (max-width: 900px) { .app { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .sidebar { position: fixed; left: -260px; top: 0; width: 260px; z-index: 40; transition: left 0.25s ease-out; box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); } .sidebar.open { left: 0; } .sidebar-backdrop { display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); z-index: 35; } .sidebar-backdrop.active { display: block; } .mobile-topbar { display: flex; } .main { padding: 18px 16px; } .page-title { font-size: 20px; } .stat-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } .form-row, .form-row-3 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .filter-bar input, .filter-bar select { min-width: 0; max-width: none; width: 100%; } .search-input-wrap { min-width: 0; max-width: none; width: 100%; } .modal { max-width: 100%; } th, td { padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 12.5px; } th:first-child, td:first-child { padding-left: 14px; } th:last-child, td:last-child { padding-right: 14px; } } @media (max-width: 600px) { .stat-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .stat-value { font-size: 22px; } .page-actions { width: 100%; } .page-actions .btn { flex: 1; } .student-row { flex-wrap: wrap; } .attendance-toggle { width: 100%; } .attendance-toggle .att-btn { flex: 1; } } /* ============ UTILS ============ */ .row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .row-between { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .text-dim { color: var(--text-dim); } .text-soft { color: var(--text-soft); } .text-muted { color: var(--text-muted); } .text-success { color: var(--success); } .text-danger { color: var(--danger); } .text-warning { color: var(--warning); } .font-mono { font-family: var(--font-mono); } .fw-600 { font-weight: 600; } .fw-700 { font-weight: 700; } .fs-xs { font-size: 11.5px; } .fs-sm { font-size: 12.5px; } .fs-md { font-size: 14px; } .fs-lg { font-size: 16px; } .mb-2 { margin-bottom: 8px; } .mb-3 { margin-bottom: 12px; } .mb-4 { margin-bottom: 16px; } .mt-2 { margin-top: 8px; } .mt-3 { margin-top: 12px; } .mt-4 { margin-top: 16px; } .gap-2 { gap: 8px; } .flex-1 { flex: 1; } .hidden { display: none !important; }
